Introduction
    On a rural island off of Hong Kong, a mute man who runs a small inn and whose only companion is his tomboy best friend, falls for a Hongkongese woman who rents his room to find peace after a heartbreak.

Production companies: Mei Ah Films Production Co. Ltd.
